changelog: Fixed: Slideshow animations now start instantly — reduced kickoff delays from 600ms to 100ms across all 6 mockups, tightened bar stagger timings for immediate visual feedback on slide entry.
Fixed: Uniform bar colors in Dashboard and Progress charts — rest day bars no longer use a different gray shade, all bars match for cleaner appearance.
Fixed: Removed amber peak-day label highlight in Progress chart — all day labels use consistent muted color.
Changed: Notification slide now shows a large centered bell icon instead of the widget card, permission label removed on web platforms.
